# informed-skills — LLM Index (full)
#
# This is a repo for shipping installable "Agent Skills".
# Treat changes under `skills/`, `skills/.experimental/`, `.agents/skills/`, and
# `.github/` as release artifacts.
#
# Quick start
# - List installable skills from a local checkout: `bash scripts/list-installable-skills.sh`
# - Run all repo gates: `just check`
#
# Non-negotiables (see `AGENTS.md` for the full contract)
# - `just check` must pass before commit/PR.
# - Path-based gates must enumerate all three install lanes:
#   - `skills/*`
#   - `skills/.experimental/*`
#   - `.agents/skills/*`
# - Skill schema parity is enforced by each skill's `evals/run-static-checks.sh`.
# - `AGENTS.md` is hand-curated from `docs/reflection-log/`; do not autogenerate.
#
# Primary entrypoints
# - `README.md`: overview + install instructions + layout
# - `constitution.md`: repo charter (purpose + invariants)
# - `AGENTS.md`: agent instructions for working in this repo
# - `docs/reflection-log/`: per-failure entries; source-of-truth for future rules/gates
# - `docs/adr/`: architectural decisions (the "why")
# - `docs/runbooks/`: maintainer procedures (the "how")
#
# Repo map
#
# Root
# - `Justfile`: `just check` orchestrator (invoked by contributors and CI)
# - `.github/workflows/ci.yml`: CI (runs the same core gates as `just check`)
# - `.github/CODEOWNERS`: required reviewers for release-critical paths
# - `.claude/settings.json`, `.claude/hooks/*`: Claude Code hooks and tests
#
# Skills (the product)
# - `skills/dx-heuristics/`: reviewed/published skill
# - `skills/test-heuristics/`: reviewed/published skill
# - `skills/clean-architecture/`: published skill
# - `skills/project-agentification/`: published skill
# - `skills/evidence-driven-agent-rules/`: published skill; pairs with project-agentification for repos with a feedback signal (eval/telemetry/baseline)
# - `skills/ui-design-craft/`: published skill
# - `skills/ux-accessibility-heuristics/`: published skill
# - `skills/perf-observability-heuristics/`: published skill; systems performance + observability (latency / throughput / resources / tracing / logs / metrics / SLOs across backend, browser/network, and DB-perf tiers)
# - `skills/topic-research/`: published skill; source-cited research reports on a named topic (primer / survey / deep-dive depth modes) — no decision frame required; grounded in canonical literature-review methodology
# - `skills/.experimental/`: reserved and currently empty
# - `skills/_shared/`: cross-skill primitives (lenses.md, empirical-warnings.md W2–W10); not a standalone skill; consumers symlink in their references/
# - `skills/example-minimal/`: internal template contract (hidden unless
#   `INSTALL_INTERNAL_SKILLS=1`); kept so new contributors can't template a skill
#   that bypasses required gates.
#
# Skill contract (every skill directory)
# - `SKILL.md` (YAML frontmatter; < 800 words)
# - `skill.json` (`status: "published"` for installable skills, maintainers, inspired_by, etc.)
# - `evals/run-static-checks.sh` (schema + structure gates)
# - `evals/trigger-evals.json` (canonical schema; validated, not executed yet)
# - `evals/activation-cases.md` (behavioral examples)
#
# Repo-local authoring skills (not published)
# - `.agents/skills/skill-curator/`
# - `.agents/skills/skill-reviewer/`
#
# Docs
# - `docs/reflection-log/`: per-failure entries (evidence-first workflow); see its `README.md` for the recording-bar vs. promotion-bar distinction
# - `docs/agent-readiness-2026-05-15.md`: historical assessment (may be stale)
# - `docs/specs/`: specs for significant work (new skills, schema changes, new gates)
# - `docs/adr/`: ADRs (durable decisions)
# - `docs/runbooks/`: runbooks (durable procedures)
# - `docs/architecture/`: reference docs / repo maps
